## Type of change

- [ ] Add community entry
- [ ] Correct existing community entry
- [ ] Update category or maintenance docs
- [ ] Update site generation or presentation

## Verification

- [ ] Updated `data/communities.json`
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate-data.mjs`
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/generate-readme.mjs` if community data changed
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/build-site.mjs` if data or site generation changed

## Source and review notes

Add public source links and explain whether the change is based on personal experience, public information, or both.

## Boundary check

- [ ] This PR does not include operational steps, download paths, bypass methods, exploit details, transaction routes, or current mirror chasing.
